items.question: How thick should a garage or barn floor be?
items.answer: Most residential garage floors are poured 4–6 inches thick; barn pads and heavy-equipment areas may be thicker for added strength.

items.question: Will the floor crack in cold weather?
items.answer: Our fiber-reinforced, high-strength mix and wire mesh reinforcement minimize cracking, even through Ohio winters.

items.question: Can garage floors be decorative?
items.answer: Yes. We offer sealed, colored, and finished options that are both attractive and easy to clean.

items.question: Do you pour barn pads and outbuilding floors?
items.answer: Absolutely. We handle garages, barns, workshops, and equipment pads of all sizes.
